game_info.title: Helix Jump 3D
game_info.concept:
Helix Jump is a 3d arcade game where players smash, bump and bounce through revolving helix platforms to reach the end.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/helix-jump/id1345968745

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Helix Jump is a 3d arcade game where players smash, bump and bounce through revolving helix platforms to reach the end.
Sound easy? You wish!


Your ball drops like a brick through colorful helix platforms that block its descent, but if you hit a red spot, it's all over! Your ball shatters to pieces and you have to start your fall all over again.


But even traps platforms are no match for a fireball falling at full speed! Choose your strategy: speed up like a madman or stop and wait for your next chance to roll and jump. Other ball games wish they were this fun!


Why Helix Jump rules:
- Crazy fast speed
- Fun gameplay
- Bright vibrant graphics
- Simple and easy to play
- Great time killer
game_info.description: Helix Jump 3D is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a rotating tower to guide a bouncing ball through gaps in helical platforms. Your goal is to reach the bottom of the tower without touching the deadly red zones. Time your movements carefully—gravity is your friend, but the red segments are your enemy. Descend through as many levels as possible to set a high score!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Rotate tower left
- Arrow Right / D: Rotate tower right
- ENTER: Start game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart game (after game over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic game loop and physics functionality by simulating a passive player.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will start the game and apply constant rotation to the right. This checks if the physics engine correctly handles gravity, bouncing, and eventual collision with a trap or gap without crashing.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for several seconds, the ball bounces, score updates potentially, and eventually triggers a GAME_OVER state when hitting a trap or falling off bounds, confirming state transitions work.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify win condition capabilities by using an AI solver to navigate gaps.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI calculates the angle of the nearest gap on the platform directly below the ball. It automatically rotates the tower to align the gap with the ball's position, effectively "solving" the level.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The ball successfully passes through multiple platforms, score increases significantly, and the game continues for an extended duration without hitting traps, demonstrating playable mechanics.
